title: Column value is group name
excerpt: Is there a way to set the column value to the group name?

posts.author: membermarketing (Michelle Cole)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to set the column value to the group name?

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @membermarketing

If you mean you want a text or formula column to automatically output the name of the group it is in, this is not possible.

However, if you have a specific Status Column to show the group an item is in, you can use Automations like these to set and change the status according to the group it is created in or moved to:

image2344×1034 226 KB

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Cheers,
Jenna
